Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser

Class ReaderParser

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.Parser
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.ReaderParser
Direct Known Subclasses:
CsvParser, HjsonParser, HoconParser, IniParser, JsonParser, MarkdownParser, PlainTextParser, RdfParser, SseParser, TomlParser, UonParser, XmlParser, YamlParser
public class ReaderParser extends Parser
Subclass of Parser for characters-based parsers.
Description

This class is typically the parent class of all character-based parsers. It has 1 abstract method to implement on the session object...

  • parse(ParserSession, ClassMeta)
Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:
  • Serializers and Parsers

    • create

      public static ReaderParser.Builder<?> create()

    • createSession

      public ReaderParserSession.Builder<?> createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class Parser
      Returns:
      A new session builder.

    • getSession

      public ReaderParserSession getSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Returns a session to use for this context.

      Note that subclasses may opt to return a reusable non-modifiable session.

      Overrides:
      getSession in class Parser
      Returns:
      A new session object.

      Returns:
      true if this parser subclasses from ReaderParser.

    • getFileCharset

      protected final Charset getFileCharset()
      File charset.
      Returns:
      The character set to use for reading Files from the file system.
      See Also:
      • ReaderParser.Builder.fileCharset(Charset)

    • getStreamCharset

      protected final Charset getStreamCharset()
      Input stream charset.
      Returns:
      The character set to use for converting InputStreams and byte arrays to readers.
      See Also:
      • ReaderParser.Builder.streamCharset(Charset)
